rationale: The citing paper mentions Soberman (2003) only in a grouped parenthetical list of prior signaling literature. It does not discuss that paper's specific warranty signaling-screening framework, nor does it rely on its assumptions, results, or empirical setting in developing the current model. There is no identifiable later section where Soberman (2003) is used to motivate hypotheses, derive mechanisms, or interpret findings. This indicates a background positioning citation rather than a substantive directional link.
